name: Floor Plan to Photorealistic Property Tour Generator (Fixed)

parameters.formDescription: Upload your floor plan image to generate a photorealistic property tour video.

assignments.name: isometricPrompt
assignments.value: =Top-down, fully 3D isometric render of this exact floor plan layout. Create a clean, highly detailed miniature architectural maquette matching the reference floor plan exactly. {{ $json.styleDescription }}. Remove all text labels. Keep all walls, doors, furniture, appliances and rooms properly placed according to the floor plan. High-resolution, photorealistic materials (wood floors, tiles, fabrics, glass). Soft global lighting, subtle shadows, crisp edges. Professional, polished output.

assignments.name: livingRoomPrompt
assignments.value: =Eye-level photorealistic interior render of a living room. {{ $json.styleDescription }}. Comfortable seating arrangement, coffee table, entertainment center, warm ambient lighting, tasteful decor. High-quality materials and textures. Based on the floor plan layout.

assignments.name: kitchenPrompt
assignments.value: =Eye-level photorealistic interior render of a kitchen. {{ $json.styleDescription }}. Sleek cabinets, quality countertops, modern appliances, island or dining area, bright natural lighting. Clean, functional design.

assignments.name: bedroomPrompt
assignments.value: =Eye-level photorealistic interior render of a bedroom. {{ $json.styleDescription }}. Comfortable bed with quality linens, nightstands, wardrobe, soft ambient lighting, cozy atmosphere.

assignments.name: patioPrompt
assignments.value: =Eye-level photorealistic render of an outdoor patio area. {{ $json.styleDescription }}. Quality outdoor furniture, potted plants, ambient lighting, comfortable seating, inviting atmosphere for entertaining.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "Smooth cinematic camera movement through the living room, showcasing the space from multiple angles with gentle panning",
  "imageUrls": ["{{ $json.resultUrl }}"],
  "model": "veo3_fast",
  "aspectRatio": "16:9",
  "seeds": 12345,
  "enableFallback": false,
  "enableTranslation": true,
  "generationType": "REFERENCE_2_VIDEO"
}
